narrative:
Westerville 4-C (precinct in Franklin County) has 952 registered voters, with 51.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.3%, a modest Republican lean of 4.2 percentage points.
